Generation Metadata
===================

- Model: Gemini (Gemini 3.5 Flash) / Antigravity
- Generation Date: 2026-07-07
- Input Files Used:
  - dist/20260707/analysis_result.md
  - dist/20260707/manuscript_non_traumatic_sah_phenotypes.md
  - BigQuery validation tables (mimic-study-498508.non_traumatic_sah_study)

This directory contains the generated analysis results, figures, and reporting artifacts for the non-traumatic subarachnoid hemorrhage (non-traumatic SAH) study. The English and Chinese manuscript markdown and PDF files in this folder were generated/translated/compiled by Gemini (Gemini 3.5 Flash) / Antigravity using the above input sources.

Generated Artifacts:
- dist/20260707/manuscript_non_traumatic_sah_phenotypes.md (English Manuscript)
- dist/20260707/manuscript_non_traumatic_sah_phenotypes_cn.md (Chinese Manuscript)
- dist/20260707/pdf/manuscript_non_traumatic_sah_phenotypes_en.pdf (English PDF)
- dist/20260707/pdf/manuscript_non_traumatic_sah_phenotypes_cn.pdf (Chinese PDF)
